implementation_summary.summary: CP00-631 covers RP20 Data Room And VDR P06 type/shape tail plus primary/secondary permission matrix bridge over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, P06 type-shape test tail, P06 primary implementation, P06 secondary workflow head, cross-tenant test, and leak-prevention test boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-631 RP20.P06.M02.S19-RP20.P06.M04.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
